top_signals.title: China blacklists MP Materials, USA Rare Earth in critical minerals war
top_signals.summary: Beijing's latest trade restrictions deepen a growing struggle over supply chains vital to defence and advanced manufacturing.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: UPS to invest $48 million in temperature-controlled facilities amid healthcare boom
top_signals.summary: UPS is announcing a new investment in healthcare logistics as demand for the temperature-controlled category booms, CNBC has learned exclusively.

top_signals.title: Industry Leaders See Regulation as Main Barrier to Offshore Vessel Electrification
top_signals.summary: Vessel electrification is no longer a future concept for offshore wind and policy and regulatory alignment is now the main barrier to uptake, a cross-industry panel hosted by Bibby Marine told an audience during Global Offshore Wind on Wednesday.Speakers from RenewableUK…
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
